title: Funded early education and childcare: 2025
body: "These statistics cover the:     universal entitlement for all 3 and 4-year-olds working parent entitlement for eligible children aged 9 months to 4 years families receiving additional support entitlement for eligible 2-year-olds   These statistics replace ‘provision for children under 5 in England’. The content remains unchanged. "

taxons.title: Data collection for early years and childcare
